---
title: "untitled"
author: "Katie L. Duggan DiDominic"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

## Load packages
```{r}
#install.packages("tidyverse")
library(tidyverse)
library(NatParksPalettes)

install.packages("reticulate")
library(reticulate)

reticulate::install_python(version = "3.11") #install python

py_install("pymodbus") #install pymodbus
py_config() #check that python works
```
